given: existing stock rows whose inventory_code lacks a batch or serial segment (for example "X-1" or a bare "c")
when: the split migration runs against those rows
then: each such row has batch_number and serial_number left NULL rather than guessed or dropped

independence.rationale: AC1 asserts conforming codes produce populated batch/serial values; this AC adds the distinct outcome that codes without those segments are recorded as NULL, which can be broken (by guessing a value) without breaking AC1's parse of conforming codes.
